text.title: AR Design Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the AR component target multiple environments (indoor + outdoor)?

branch.question: Is there a dwell/gaze interaction without alternate?

text.example: Concrete walk: Maintenance AR app (mixed env) with anchored panels, env-aware contrast, pinch+dwell alternates → approve.
